svg.title: GCP DevOps Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Production-ready CI/CD pipeline on GCP: Developer pushes code to GitHub, GitHub Actions builds and pushes Docker images to Artifact Registry, Terraform provisions infrastructure, Cloud Run serves the app, users upload CVs to Cloud Storage.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the developer do in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub trigger the CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What steps does the GitHub Actions pipeline run?')
sendPrompt('What is Artifact Registry used for in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does Cloud Run serve the job application app?')
sendPrompt('How is Cloud Storage used for CV uploads?')
sendPrompt('How do users access the job application web app?')
